text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 22. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Writing scripts to process image datasets. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Healthy choices are great. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. We need to do this more often.
title: Social Update

text: I've noted the plans. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Setting my fantasy football lineup. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Jingle Bells for the upcoming piano recital. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Social breaks are great. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
